bar: A replacement must match or beat qmd on every slice before qmd leaves the alpha.15 baseline.

documents.body: Randomized trial of mobile reminders improved medication adherence in chronic care.
Interview study: patients described alarm fatigue, patient burden, and notification overload.
Citation neighborhood links adherence interventions to implementation barriers and follow-up attrition.

verdict.reason: FTS5 covers lexical cases, but without a packaged sqlite-vec plus local embedding pipeline it misses synonym/semantic cases. Keep qmd as the alpha.15 baseline retrieval substrate.
